R

random - Variable in class simulation.SimulationEngine
Random number generator used to pick new destinations
RANDOM_DESTINATION - Enum constant in enum class simulation.ArrivalBehavior
 
reconstructPath(Map<Node, Node>, Node) - Method in class pathfinding.AStarPathFinder
Reconstructs path from cameFrom map.
redrawAgents() - Method in class view.GraphView
Redraws agents using their current progress on edges.
refreshSelection() - Method in class view.GraphView
Refreshes the appearance of all nodes and edges according to the current selection.
registerPass(double) - Method in class model.Edge
 
registerPass(double) - Method in class model.Node
Registers a pass through this node with the given speed.
REMOVE - Enum constant in enum class simulation.ArrivalBehavior
 
removeAgent(Agent) - Method in class model.Edge
Removes an agent from this edge.
removeAgent(Agent) - Method in class model.Node
Removes an agent from this node.
removeAgent(Agent) - Method in class simulation.SimulationEngine
Removes an agent from the simulation entirely.
removeEdge(Node, Node) - Method in class model.Graph
Removes an edge between the source node and the destination node.
removeNode(Node) - Method in class model.Graph
Removes a node from the graph and deletes all edges connected to it.
renderAgents(List<Agent>) - Method in class view.GraphView
 
renderGraph(Graph) - Method in class view.GraphView
Renders the graph by drawing nodes, edges, and labels.
replaceWith(Graph) - Method in class model.Graph
 
reset() - Method in class simulation.SimulationEngine
Resets the simulation to its initial state.
resetBtn - Variable in class ui.SimulationBar
 
resetPassStats() - Method in class model.Edge
 
resetPassStats() - Method in class model.Node
Resets pass statistics for this node.
restoreSimulation(String) - Static method in class io.SaveManager
Loads a simulation state from a binary file.
ROAD - Enum constant in enum class model.EdgeType
